message.content:
The page has a light blue background. It is divided into two rectangular sections by a thin vertical line running down the center.  

### Left Section:  
- Contains the "wesal" logo:  
  - Arabic text: "وسال" (stylized, dark teal color).  
  - Below the Arabic text, the word "wesal" in lowercase, dark teal font.  
  - To the right of the text, a light blue heart-shaped icon with a stylized design (resembling a pretzel or intertwined loops) inside it.  


### Right Section:  
- Top-right corner: Text "WESAL LITERATURE" in uppercase, small dark gray font, followed by "LIT 193-B" in smaller dark gray font.  
- Below that, centered: "1ST SEMESTER" in uppercase, dark gray font.  
- Large, bold text: "Essays & Critical Papers" in a teal color (matching the logo’s text color), with "Essays &" on the first line, "Critical" on the second, and "Papers" on the third.  
- Bottom-right corner: A smaller version of the light blue heart-shaped icon (matching the left section’s icon).  
- Below the icon: Text "LECTURER: PROF." in uppercase, dark gray font, followed by "ISHANI GARG" in smaller dark gray font.  


### Overall Layout:  
- The left section is slightly narrower than the right section.  
- Both sections have a light gray (off-white) background, contrasting with the outer light blue background.  
- The design is minimalistic, with clean lines and ample white space.
